statement: In every magma, Equation 3114 (`x = (((y * x) * y) * x) * z`) implies Equation 1804 (`x = (y * z) * ((z * w) * w)`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0330
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op (op y x) y) x) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y z) (op (op z w) w))
